title: session-ui-freshness client-side data contracts
description: TypeScript-equivalent contracts for store entries and tweak config keys introduced by session-ui-freshness. Server event payloads are NOT modified by this plan; this schema covers only client-side extensions (DD-1 inline receivedAt) and tweak additions (DD-3, DD-5).
$comment: All timestamps in ms since Unix epoch unless stated otherwise.

ClientStampMeta.description: Inline client-side metadata appended to store entries (DD-1). Not part of server payload.

receivedAt.description: Wall-clock time (ms since epoch, client Date.now()) when the reducer wrote this entry. Missing / NaN / Infinity / negative values MUST be treated as 0 (instant-stale, DD-4).

ServerSessionStatus.description: Shape maintained by the server. This plan does not modify it; included here only as the base of StoreSessionStatusEntry.

StoreSessionStatusEntry.description: Client store entry for State.session_status[sid]. Intersection of ServerSessionStatus and ClientStampMeta (DD-1 inline, DD-8 no wrapper / no meta sub-object).

ServerActiveChild.description: Server shape for active subagent child. This plan does not modify it.

ServerMonitorEntry.description: Server shape for a session_monitor entry. This plan does not modify it.

ProcessCard.description: UI-layer view object derived from a StoreMonitorEntry. DD-7: `elapsed` semantics clarified to 'ms since last daemon confirmation' — i.e. now - receivedAt.

receivedAt.description: Copied from source StoreMonitorEntry; drives freshness calculation

elapsed.description: Derived: Math.max(0, now - receivedAt). Semantics changed from 'now - startedAt' (DD-7). Field name unchanged to avoid churning call sites.

fidelity.description: Classification at render time based on (now - receivedAt) vs tweak thresholds. Missing/invalid receivedAt forces 'hard-stale' (DD-4).

TweaksFrontendResponse.description: Response shape for GET /config/tweaks/frontend (DD-3). This schema lists the keys added by this plan; other keys from prior plans remain untouched.

ui_session_freshness_enabled.description: Feature flag (DD-5). 0 = bypass freshness UI (baseline render). 1 = freshness-aware UI.

ui_freshness_threshold_sec.description: Soft threshold (R2). Entries older than this show 'updated Ns ago' hint.

ui_freshness_hard_timeout_sec.description: Hard threshold (R2). Entries older than this are gray-out / collapse / hide per component.

FreshnessClockSignal.description: Return shape of useFreshnessClock() helper (DD-2). Exposes a Solid accessor signal that ticks every 1s.

freshnessNow.description: Solid Accessor<number>; reading invokes subscription. Value is current Date.now() refreshed every 1000ms.
